title: The Unknotting Dark

features.name: the untied thread
features.desc-on-touch: a single thread, half-unraveled; it remembers being part of a knot but doesn't miss the binding anymore

features.name: the memory of knots
features.desc-on-touch: marks where knots used to hold; the marks are fading, and by tomorrow they'll be gone, and the unweaving will be complete

features.name: the undoing tower
features.desc-on-touch: stacked loops of thread, each level lower than the last; the tower dismantles itself from the top down, one loop per moment

features.name: the tangled release
features.desc-on-touch: where threads gather before they disperse; the water here carries away the knots that unknotting produces

features.name: the loom's extinction
features.desc-on-touch: the geometric shape of a loom, but rendered as though it's dissolving into light; the pattern it held is now just memory

inscription: the knots unmake downward; each thread learns to forget it was ever bound

file.name: Loom_Dissolution_Study_Field_Notes.txt
file.note: observations of threads unwinding themselves without hands; the process teaches itself with each loop that falls

exits.label: up to where knots still imagine they have purpose
deeper to where unweaving becomes the only direction left
westward to the chamber where looms remember what they wove
